findings.description: Inline comments were stripped from the format definition file example. The source includes property-level comments (e.g., `# 文字列型フィールドの文字エンコーディング`, `# 各レコードの長さ`, `# 固定長`) that explain what each directive does, and field-level comments (e.g., `# ログインID`, `# 漢字氏名`) that provide Japanese labels for each field. These carry semantic information useful for understanding the configuration.

findings.description: The automated warning 'Section count 5 < source headings 10' is a false positive. The source contains 5 h2-level sections (アプリケーション開発者が実装する成果物, フォーマット定義ファイル, 一時テーブルの定義, Formクラス, SQLファイル) plus 1 h3-level sub-section (実際のテーブル定義の例) that is correctly merged into s3. The knowledge file's 5 sections (s1–s5) map accurately to the 5 h2 sections; no over-consolidation occurred.
